text:
市街地に突如として出現したダーカー。
戦技会場で報せを受け、単身で市街地へと
駆け出すストラトス。守護輝士は
彼女の助けとなるべくその後を追う。
――――――――――――――――――――
失敗条件/戦闘不能後、リタイアを選択
　　　　　　　　　市民の戦闘不能

市街地に突如として出現したダーカー。
戦技会場で報せを受け、単身で市街地へと
駆け出すストラトス。守護輝士は
彼女の助けとなるべくその後を追う。

After receiving a report that Falspawn had
suddenly appeared in the City Area, Stratos
set out alone to the site of the disturbance.
The Guardians followed close behind
hoping that they could offer their assistance.
----------------------------------------
You will fail this quest if you become incapacitated
or retire or if any city residents
become incapacitated.

After receiving a report that Falspawn had suddenly appeared
in the City Area, Stratos set out alone to the site of the
disturbance. The Guardians followed close behind hoping that
they could offer their assistance.
逃げ遅れた市民を救助せよ！
